name: Mercer County Golf Academy
about: The Mercer County Golf Academy, operating under the Simductive Golf brand, is a year-round indoor facility located in West Windsor, New Jersey. It offers a 6,000 square-foot space equipped with three golf simulators featuring aboutGOLF 3TRAK® machine vision technology, a 600 square-foot indoor putting green, and a club fitting center. The venue is specifically geared toward golfers of all ages and skill levels with a focus on instruction, from private lessons and clinics to leagues and tournaments. Its primary appeal is as a dedicated training and practice environment for those looking to improve their game, especially during the winter months.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art aboutGOLF 3TRAK® simulator technology for precise data tracking
Comprehensive junior academy and development programs for young golfers
Dedicated indoor facility for year-round practice and play, regardless of weather
In-depth club fitting and club services to optimize equipment performance
Structured programs like leagues and tournaments for competitive play

food_and_drink.notes: No mention of an on-site kitchen or food service
No mention of alcohol service. BYOB is not indicated.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, golfers are expected to bring their own clubs. The facility also offers club fitting services to help optimize your equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, the website does not mention an on-site kitchen or bar, and there is no indication of outside food or drink being allowed.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, 18 holes on a simulator typically take 1-1.5 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the Mercer County Golf Academy offers a comprehensive Junior Academy with programs for youth, including development programs, clinics, leagues, and camps.
